heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyINTERMEDIA INC.HomeAboutContactPrivacy PolicyPrivacy PoliciesHomeAboutContactPrivacy PolicyPrivacy PoliciesSearchPRIVACY POLICY FOR "HD CAMERA PRO"HD Camera Professional is a powerful camera app to transform your default phone camera into professional look and feel camera feature. When you use these app, we need permission to access and utilize some of your device’s hardware, also you’ll share some information with us. We get that it can affect your privacy. So we want to be transparent about the

information we collect, how we use it, whom share it with, and the options that we give you to control, access and update your information. That’s why we write this Privacy Policy, so the user are to be clear about terms of service using these app. If you still have questions about anything in our Privacy Policy, just fell free to contact us.Information We CollectThe main information we get (only) when you use our app is listed below:

1. Camera and Gallery.Our app require to get permission to access your camera and gallery and other information related to it, because this is a camera app which use camera and gallery as a primary resources, without it the app won’t work.
2. Device’s Microphone.Our app require permission to access your microphone and use it to record audio as the camera record video through the camera.

3. GPS / LocationOur app require permission to access your location when you want to use Geo tagging feature, to embed current location to your captured photos4. Analytics and Advertising Services Provided by Others.We may let other companies  use tracking technologies on the services. These companies may collect information about how you use the app. This information may be used to, among other things, analyze and track data, determine the popularity of certain content, and better understand your online activity. Additionally, some companies may use information collected on our app to deliver a better and targeted advertisements on behalf of us or other companies, including on third-party websites and apps.
